introduction:
The Telangana Transport Department facilitates getting a legal permit through a two-phase hierarchy: initially securing a Learner's Licence (LLR) and graduating to a Permanent Driving Licence (DL).

Telangana has heavily integrated digital solutions allowing you to book RTO slots online easily through the T-App Folio app and the TS Transport portal.
quickFacts:
Crucial Path
  • LLR Test: Required to take a computer-based traffic rules test at the RTO or online via Aadhaar.
  • DL Test Phase: Open only after 30 days of securing LLR.
  • TS utilizes sensors and camera-based Automated Driving Test Tracks strictly.
documentsRequired:
Documents Required

For Learner's Licence (LLR)
  • Aadhaar Card with biometrics
  • Applicable Age Validation
  • Passport Size pictures
  • Declaration of Health (Form 1)
For Permanent DL
  • Original Printed LLR
  • DL Application Form via TS Transport
  • Receipt of successful smart card fee payment
  • T-App Folio Slot confirmation
onlineApplication:
How to Apply Online

Stage 1: Apply for LLR
  1. Use the TS Transport Official Web Portal or T-App Folio.
  2. Navigate towards "Learner Licence" application.
  3. Key in Aadhaar numbers, verify via OTP, and map your profile.
  4. Remit the digital challan successfully. Then pass the digital signage test online.
Stage 2: Elevate to DL
  1. Re-authenticate past the 30-day period.
  2. Book the highly regulated physical test slot for applicable Telangana vehicle classes.
  3. Process all track validation fees.
offlineApplication:
How to Apply Offline / Driving Test

  1. Land on the Automated Driving Test Tracks (e.g., Kondapur, Nagole) prior to the set agenda.
  2. Use your registered automobile ensuring L plates are displayed correctly.
  3. Prove practical street and obstacle competence through automated sensors relaying metrics to the central hub.
afterApplying: Once Approved: No human bias exists! If sensors light up green, your DL generates digitally instantly. The physical piece traces to your address via Registered Post.
helpfulLinks: MoRTH Sarathi Portal TS Transport Dept
